entries.degree: PhD in Engineering Sciences (Doctorat en Science de l'Ingénieur)
entries.description: Research on reinforcement learning for decision-making and motion planning in autonomous driving. Topics include scalable multi-agent self-play, trajectory optimization, and sim-to-real transfer. Affiliated with the INRIA ASTRA research team.
Excellence Scholar (Boursier d'excellence). Core modules: Advanced Machine Learning, Advanced Image & Signal Processing, AI for Human-Machine Interaction, AI for Robotics.

entries.degree: M2 + State Engineering Degree in Automation (Ingénieur d'État)
entries.description: 5-year engineering program. Key modules: Advanced Control, Robotics, Optimal Control, Industrial Computing, Nonlinear Systems, Power Electronics. Strong foundation bridging control theory and AI.
